## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/feature request.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update (no functional code changes)
- [ ] CI/CD or build tool configuration change

## Quality Assurance & Verification

Please detail how these changes were tested:
- Test Device: [e.g. Pixel Emulator API 34]
- Steps performed to verify correctness:
  1. ...
  2. ...

### Screenshots / Videos (if UI changes were made)
Include screenshots or recordings showing the updated visual state.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project (Kotlin conventions).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated corresponding documentation (`README.md`, etc.).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or lint issues.
- [ ] I have added/updated unit or UI tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works.
- [ ] All new and existing tests passed locally (`./gradlew test verifyPaparazzi`).
- [ ] I have checked that no credentials, passwords, local paths, or keystore files are committed in my changes.
- [ ] My branch is rebased on `main` and compiles cleanly.
